description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a white exterior and a prominent brown tiled roof. The front facade is adorned with two flowering trees, a covered porch supported by columns, and large windows that allow ample natural light. The roofline is complex, with multiple gables and a combination of flat and sloped sections, adding architectural interest. The rear of the house includes a spacious balcony or terrace area, and the side view reveals a three-car garage with wooden doors. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and smaller, regularly spaced ones. The landscaping is minimal but includes a small patch of grass and decorative shrubbery at the entrance.
description: A two-story white house with a brown tiled roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a three-car garage. The facade is accented by flowering trees and a mix of flat and gabled roof sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, two flowering trees, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three-car garage with wooden doors and the flat expanse of the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a spacious terrace or balcony, additional windows, and the complex roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, roof details, and a detached roof segment on the ground.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, double doors, small steps, and decorative landscaping
